name: Volumetric Flask Class A
shortDescription: High precision Class 'A' borosilicate glass volumetric flasks with NABL certification.
description: Manufactured from borosilicate glass 3.3, these volumetric flasks conform to IS/ISO standards. Available in Class A and Class B variants with NABL certification on request. Ideal for accurate volumetric analysis in pharmaceutical and research labs.

name: Borosilicate Beaker
shortDescription: Heavy duty borosilicate beakers with printed graduation markings.
description: Griffin style beakers manufactured from borosilicate glass 3.3. Graduated with white enamel printing. Resistant to thermal shock, chemicals and acids. Suitable for heating, mixing and measuring liquids.

name: Erlenmeyer Flask
shortDescription: Conical Erlenmeyer flasks in borosilicate glass, narrow and wide mouth variants.
description: Erlenmeyer (conical) flasks suitable for mixing, heating and culture work. Available in narrow mouth (NM) and wide mouth (WM) variants. Manufactured from borosilicate glass 3.3 conforming to ISO standards.

name: Burette Class A
shortDescription: Precision Class A borosilicate burettes with PTFE stopcock.
description: Class A burettes with Schellbach stripe for easy reading. PTFE stopcock ensures chemical resistance. Available with or without stopcock. Ideal for titration in pharmaceutical and analytical labs.

name: Polypropylene Measuring Cylinder
shortDescription: Class A PP measuring cylinders, autoclavable and chemical resistant.
description: Polypropylene measuring cylinders are lightweight, unbreakable, autoclavable at 121°C and highly resistant to most chemicals. Graduated with transparent windows for easy reading. Available in Class A.

name: Polypropylene Volumetric Flask
shortDescription: Class A PP volumetric flasks with leak-proof stoppers.
description: Polypropylene volumetric flasks are ideal where chemical resistance and breakage prevention are priorities. Class A accuracy. Transparent mark-line and leak-proof PP stopper included.

name: Silica Crucible
shortDescription: High purity fused silica crucibles for high-temperature applications.
description: Manufactured from 99.9% pure fused silica. Suitable for high-temperature fusion, ashing and ignition. Excellent thermal shock resistance. Available in various sizes.

name: Quartz Crucible
shortDescription: Ultra-pure quartz crucibles for semiconductor and analytical applications.
description: Premium quartz crucibles manufactured from ultra-pure synthetic quartz. Used in semiconductor, optical fiber and analytical applications requiring extreme purity and thermal stability up to 1650°C.

name: Autoclave
shortDescription: Vertical and horizontal autoclaves for sterilisation of lab equipment and media.
description: Stainless steel autoclaves with digital temperature and pressure controls. Suitable for sterilisation of culture media, glassware and surgical instruments. Available in vertical and horizontal configurations in various chamber volumes.

name: Incubator
shortDescription: Bacteriological and BOD incubators with precise temperature control.
description: Bacteriological incubators and BOD incubators for culture and biochemical applications. Double-walled SS interior, microprocessor-based PID temperature control, and uniform temperature distribution. Available in various capacities.

name: Hot Air Oven
shortDescription: Forced air circulation hot air ovens for drying and sterilisation.
description: Forced air circulation ovens suitable for drying, baking and sterilisation of glassware and equipment. Double-walled powder-coated exterior and SS interior with digital temperature controller and timer.

name: Centrifuge Machine
shortDescription: Bench-top and high-speed centrifuges for separation applications.
description: Bench-top centrifuges with brushless DC motor, microprocessor controls, and imbalance detection. Available in low-speed, high-speed, and refrigerated models. Suitable for clinical, pharmaceutical and research applications.

name: RT-PCR System
shortDescription: Real-Time PCR systems for quantitative nucleic acid analysis.
description: Real-Time PCR (qPCR) systems for accurate quantification of DNA/RNA. Features fast thermal cycling, multiple fluorescence channels, and intuitive software. Used in molecular diagnostics, gene expression and pathogen detection.

name: HPLC System
shortDescription: High Performance Liquid Chromatography for pharmaceutical and chemical analysis.
description: HPLC systems for separation and quantification of compounds in pharmaceutical, food and environmental samples. Includes isocratic and gradient pump, auto-sampler, column oven and UV/DAD detector.

name: GC-MS System
shortDescription: Gas Chromatography-Mass Spectrometry for volatile compound identification.
description: GC-MS systems combining gas chromatography with mass spectrometry detection. Used for identification and quantification of volatile and semi-volatile organic compounds in environmental, pharmaceutical and forensic analysis.

name: ICP-OES System
shortDescription: Inductively Coupled Plasma Optical Emission Spectrometry for multi-element analysis.
description: ICP-OES systems for rapid multi-element analysis of metals and non-metals in environmental, pharmaceutical and industrial samples. Simultaneous detection of up to 73 elements with excellent detection limits.

name: PPE Kit
shortDescription: Complete Personal Protective Equipment kits for laboratory and industrial use.
description: Full PPE kits including coverall, face shield, gloves and shoe covers. Suitable for laboratory, pharmaceutical, cleanroom and industrial environments. Available in various protection levels and sizes.

specs.label: Components
specs.value: Coverall, Face shield, Gloves, Shoe covers

name: Blue Nitrile Gloves
shortDescription: Powder-free blue nitrile examination gloves with excellent chemical resistance.
description: Premium powder-free blue nitrile gloves offering superior chemical resistance, puncture resistance, and tactile sensitivity. Latex-free, suitable for people with latex allergies. AQL 1.5 certified.

name: Purple Nitrile Gloves
shortDescription: Heavy-duty purple nitrile gloves for chemotherapy and high-risk applications.
description: Purple nitrile gloves specifically designed for handling chemotherapy drugs and other high-risk substances. ASTM D6978 tested. 30 cm extended cuff for additional protection. Double-gloving compatible.

name: Huwa-San TR-50
shortDescription: Ecological broad-spectrum non-toxic disinfectant based on hydrogen peroxide stabilised with colloidal silver.
description: Huwa-San is an advanced German technology disinfectant based on hydrogen peroxide stabilised with colloidal silver. It is an ecological, non-toxic, broad-spectrum disinfectant effective against bacteria, viruses, fungi and spores. No harmful residues.

name: Whirl-Pak Sample Bags
shortDescription: Sterile, leakproof polyethylene sample bags for laboratory sampling.
description: Whirl-Pak sample bags made of polyethylene are designed to carry solids or liquids to a laboratory for testing. Strong, sterile, and leakproof. Available in various volumes with and without media. Ideal for food, water and environmental sampling.

name: HPLC Grade Solvents
shortDescription: Ultra-pure HPLC and LC-MS grade solvents for chromatographic analysis.
description: HPLC grade solvents including Acetonitrile, Methanol, Ethanol, Isopropanol and water manufactured to the highest purity standards. UV transparent, low residue on evaporation, suitable for LC-MS applications.

name: Reference Standards
shortDescription: Certified reference materials and primary standards for analytical calibration.
description: Certified reference materials (CRM) and working standards for pharmaceutical, environmental and food testing laboratories. Traceable to national and international standards. Includes organic, inorganic and microbiology standards.
